seoTitle: Lancelin vs Landsdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lancelin and Landsdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lancelin and Landsdale.
heading: Lancelin vs Landsdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lancelin, Western Australia and Landsdale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lancelin has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Landsdale (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lancelin or Landsdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lancelin has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Landsdale scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lancelin scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Landsdale scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lancelin or Landsdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lancelin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
